summary: Good recording quality but track‑listing error; no performance details available
review: The reviewer rates the recording as good, noting a mix‑up in the track names (Row Jimmy and My Brother Esau are swapped). No comments on the musical performance or band members are provided, so the show’s quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review giving a 4‑star rating and mentioning a solid recording; lack of performance details limits the overall assessment, resulting in a moderate rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall good sound quality noted; however, track naming error (Row Jimmy mislabeled as My Brother Esau and vice‑versa).
